items.caption: A slide from a presentation with the title "check the logo." it features a checklist with three criteria for identifying a fake vans logo: "misspelled (fake)," "in the wrong position (fake)," and "real." accompanying each criterion are two images of vans shoes, one labeled "real" and the other "fake." the "real" shoes are positioned correctly with the logo in the right position, while the "fake" shoes have the logo misspelled or in the wrong position. the slide is designed with a clean, professional layout, and the text is clear and legible.
